priority_plan.name: scaffolded_readout_vs_baseline_intervention
priority_plan.expected_brain_side_signal: preserve family patch separation while improving readout transport
priority_plan.why_now: directly targets the highest-severity gap: object_to_readout_compatibility

priority_plan.name: reasoning_slice_transport_intervention
priority_plan.expected_brain_side_signal: shared reasoning slice should help without reverting to a global central loop
priority_plan.why_now: ties unified reasoning to the current best P3 operator

priority_plan.name: stress_guard_intervention
priority_plan.expected_brain_side_signal: write narrows before read collapse under stress

priority_plan.name: anchored_relation_lift_intervention
priority_plan.expected_brain_side_signal: relation lift stays anchored to family/object structure

verdict.core_answer: The P3-P4 intervention set now has an execution order, expected score regime, and expected brain-side signal for each remaining encoding gap.
verdict.next_engineering_target: run priority 1 and 2 first, then widen to stress and bridge interventions after the first joint readout results come back.
